title: Nobi Nobita Bridal Veil Ep 22 DC Source
display_title: Nobi Nobita Bridal Veil Ep 22 DC Source
wikitext:
[]: Nobi Nobita - Bridal Veil (Ep 22 DC Source)             Quote Post by 1731298478 » Sat Nov 14, 2015 1:53 pm "Bridal Veil" is a short piece by Nobi Nobita published as part of the doujin Zettai Anzen Kamisori ( Absolute Safety Razor ) in late April 1996. In his August JUNE interview with Nobita (p. 35 of the Kaworu "mook"), Anno mentions that both he and Sadamoto had felt that Nobita's depiction of Asuka in Zettai was impossible for them to match. In her comments on Zettai in the anthology Hakobune no Karasu ( The Raven of the Ark ), published August 1997, Nobita writes that Anno had been very keen on "Bridal Veil," to the point of telling her he had got some idea or ideas from it, though Nobita then said she was not sure what those ideas were. "Bridal Veil" is, like most of Nobita's other Eva works, a kind of supplement to the original series, inserting scenes in between, or elaborating upon, episodes and events in the show. "Bridal Veil" shows a series of interactions between Asuka and other characters before depicting part of her encounter with the Fifteenth Angel. Images Translation: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Sat Nov 14, 2015 2:10 pm Now this is quite a find. Thanks for showing this to us.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Nov 14, 2015 5:06 pm Holy wow, this is a really intriguing find, indeed. Thank you for the info and translation, Numbers-kun!

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Nov 14, 2015 6:16 pm No, I will not think that the last pages led to Merry Box .

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Sat Nov 14, 2015 6:28 pm Oh Numbers-kun, I love you. Bringing us all closer to the truth one translation at a time. Thank you very much!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Nov 14, 2015 8:26 pm Whoa, this is a treasure trove of Asuka analysis. Thank you! Edit: Merry Box! Good stuff!

[]: Re: Nobi Nobita - Bridal Veil (Ep 22 DC Source)             Quote Post by seraphine » Wed Mar 06, 2019 9:04 pm Hi there! I managed to track down the original fanbook this particular set comes from. I did some proper scans and used the translation in the OP (I hope this is okay!) to do a nice clean English version (YMMV on the location of the bubbles on page 14, as I tried to go in what I thought were in order.) Thanks to the original sourcer for bringing this awesome piece of NGE history to my attention! It's here, by the way: (EDIT: a link to a doujin site (e-hentai under the appropriate non-h tag instead of imgur: https://e-hentai.org/g/1377732/c4c53e87b2/ ) Hope you enjoy!

[]: Re: Nobi Nobita - Bridal Veil (Ep 22 DC Source)             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Tue Jan 18, 2022 12:47 pm ^ there’s a untranslated scan in the OP, but I believe you’re seeking for a high quality one. By the way, I never knew about this doujin and everything said here. It’s really interesting!

[]: Re: Nobi Nobita - Bridal Veil (Ep 22 DC Source)             Quote Post by Forumfanboy88 » Thu Nov 24, 2022 9:50 pm I never knew about this dojin either until recently. It makes Asuka make a whole lot more sense now in terms of her choices. Thank you!

[]: Re: Nobi Nobita - Bridal Veil (Ep 22 DC Source)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Nov 25, 2022 7:24 am I finally fully read it and I really like it. But I think the Wall of Jericho thing was implied even back in episode 9 already. The way Asuka undresses I feel is a littl over the top so I'm glad Anno's version dialed it down a bit. Amd I equally feel it's misplaced in Sadamoto's manga.
